title: poa jujuyensis
intro: Poa jujuyensis, a type of grass native to the Andes mountains, is a perennial plant belonging to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Poa jujuyensis include wound healing, pain relief, and the treatment of various gastrointestinal issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
